description: Per-stage facts sub-schema (FR-CONTRACT-002 / D11). Each stage must have the listed required_keys present and non-empty in facts.

semantics.scope: Scope boundary — what is in and what is out
semantics.decision_log_path: Path to the produced decision log, e.g. tasks/<task>/decision-log.md; consumed downstream by M8.

semantics.spec_ref: Locator of the produced spec (anchor for downstream build-plan)

semantics.changed: List of changed artifacts from this stage
